messages.content: Four colleagues (Priya, Omar, Lena, Tomas) each use exactly one tool (hammer, wrench, drill, saw) on exactly one day (Mon-Thu). Clues: 1) Priya works the day right before the drill user. 2) Omar does not use the hammer or the saw. 3) The wrench is used on Wednesday. 4) Lena works on Monday. 5) Tomas uses the saw, but not on Thursday. Determine who uses which tool on which day. Explain briefly, then give the final schedule as a list. /no_think
